opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It feels like an elephant is sitting on the centre of my chest, and my jaw is aching terribly. (Spouse on the call: he's gone really pale and sweaty and he's clutching his chest.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The chest pressure came on suddenly about 45 minutes ago while he was just sitting down, and it hasn't let up — we're really frightened.

symptom_narrative.onset: sudden, about 45 minutes ago while sitting at rest
symptom_narrative.duration: constant for about 45 minutes so far
symptom_narrative.character: a heavy crushing pressure, like an elephant sitting on the chest
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe and unrelenting, with a frightening sense that something terrible is about to happen
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: middle of the chest, spreading down the left arm and up into the lower jaw
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on all at once and has stayed constant, not coming and going
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — sitting still and shifting position have not helped at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it has not changed with movement or position; it just stays severe
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: pouring sweat, short of breath even sitting still, one episode of feeling sick in the stomach, and a strong feeling of dread
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had anything like this before; no known history of chest pain or angina
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: cannot get up out of the armchair; completely worn out by the slightest effort

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives on the semi-rural fringe of town where an ambulance may take longer to arrive; spouse is at home and has unlocked the front door

objective_data_offered.value: looks pale and is sweating heavily; sitting in an armchair gripping the centre of the chest, visibly distressed and breathing hard
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: observed over video / reported by spouse — appearance only, no measurement

objective_data_offered.value: spouse says he is clammy and short of breath even sitting still and cannot settle
no angina spray (GTN) in the house; front door has been unlocked for the ambulance
